Debt Payoff Calculator

Calculate how long it will take to pay off your debt. Enter your balance, interest rate, and monthly payment to see your payoff timeline.

FAQ

How can I pay off debt faster?

Pay more than the minimum, use the debt avalanche (highest interest first) or snowball (smallest balance first) method, and avoid adding new debt.

What is the debt avalanche method?

Pay minimums on all debts, then put extra money toward the highest-interest debt first. This saves the most in interest.

How much interest will I pay?

Total interest depends on your balance, rate, and payment amount. Higher payments reduce total interest significantly.
